title: Degradable and Anti-Degradable Channels
description: Understand degradable channels where capacity computations simplify, and anti-degradable channels with zero quantum capacity.
learningObjectives: Define degradable and anti-degradable quantum channels
Prove single-letter capacity formulas for degradable channels
Characterize channels with zero quantum capacity
Analyze examples: amplitude damping, erasure, depolarizing
Understand the role of complementary channels
